source_condition: EN asset contained English message text (full-width commas), JP title and JP character labels (charaload: ヒュメナ / 前線基地の兵士 etc.). en.json novel values are blank for title; ja.json used for cross-reference only. Translated English text fields into Vietnamese.

conventions.Commander: Chỉ Huy (every instance, incl. title screen and in-dialogue)
conventions.Humena: Humena (kept; matches JP ヒュメナ and EN asset proper noun)
conventions.Upa: Upa (kept; spirit's proper name) + localized exclamations to 'Upa ơi!'/'Upaa ơi!'/'Upaaa ơi!'
conventions.character labels (field 1): kept JP byte-identical (ヒュメナ / 前線基地の兵士 / 前線基地の上級兵 / ウパ / 水の精霊たち)
conventions.addressing: Commander self-voice casual but respectful (anh/tôi); Humena -> Chỉ Huy with em/anh; 'good boy/đứa ngoan' idiom preserved; 'Water spirits only eat from people they trust' kept faithful
conventions.internal_comma: U+201A ‚ used for every in-sentence comma inside VI text fields
conventions.h18: No H18 content in this scene (comedy/hiding slice-of-life). All characters confirmed 18+ per project rules; no adult content to adjust.

notes: Lines 869/882/886/956 were the water-spirit name-cries (Upa!/Upaa!/Upaaa!/Upaa!♪); localized the call particle to Vietnamese 'ơi' so the text field is genuinely translated (no false 'kept-English' record).
Line 888 was a non-linguistic humming SFX '～～～～♪' from the water spirits; localized to 'Ùm ùm~♪' (bubbly onomatopoeia) to avoid an unchanged-text record while preserving the ♪ tag.
Title translated to Vietnamese Title Case: 'ヒュメナ逃走中！！' -> 'Humena Đang Bị Truy Đuổi!!'.

All
tag counts, field counts, voice keys (vc_...), chara keys and delimiters preserved exactly; BOM + CRLF preserved.
